cold_start: Under 200 ms on average for create; ~1 s to resume from paused
name: Novita AI Sandbox
notes: CPU-only: Novita's own comparison states the sandbox has no GPU; GPU compute is a separate Novita product. Templates are built from Docker/OCI images, but public docs do not state Docker containers can run inside the sandbox.
pricing_model: Per-second billing on allocated vCPU and RAM; storage billed separately
summary: Novita Agent Sandbox provides isolated, stateful execution environments that let AI agents run code, install dependencies, manipulate files, and use browsers or full desktops. It is used by developers building coding agents, browser-automation agents, and long-running multi-step agent workflows.
